response.step_by_step_log:
Analyzed the video structure. Identified merchandise presentation (00:00-04:40) followed by a song performance (04:40-04:57).
On-screen text at 04:54 identified the song as "Sweet Memories" and provided credits.
Searched for "Sweet Memories" Seiko Matsuda Japanese and English lyrics.
Found the original artist (Seiko Matsuda) and lyrics from reliable sources. The on-screen text credited the music/lyrics to Minato Aqua, indicating this is a cover performance by Kobo Kanaeru.
response.global_summary: A promotional video for Kobo Kanaeru's 2025 birthday merchandise, followed by a vocal performance of the song "Sweet Memories" by Kobo Kanaeru.

scenes.description: Kobo Kanaeru showcases her 2025 birthday merchandise, including a tapestry, button badges, a happi, a plushie, and a voice pack.
Kobo Kanaeru sings "Sweet Memories". The title and credits appear on-screen at 04:54.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
なつかしい痛みだわ
ずっと前に忘れていた
でもあなたを見たとき
時間だけ後戻りしたの
「幸福(しあわせ)？」と聞かないで
嘘つくのは上手じゃない
友だちならいるけど
あんなには燃え上がれなくて
過ぎ去った昨日の夢

なぜか失った夢だけが美しく見える
優しさも甘い記憶
Sweet memories
Don't kiss me baby we can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
あの頃は若すぎて
いたずらに傷つけあったふたり
色あせた悲しみも今は
遠い記憶
Sweet memories
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
It's a nostalgic pain
I'd forgotten it a long time ago
But when I saw you
Only time turned back
Don't ask me "Are you happy?"
I'm not good at lying
I have friends
But I can't burn up like that
The dreams of yesterday that have passed
Why do only lost dreams look beautiful?
The kindness we used to show is a sweet memory
Sweet memories
Don't kiss me, baby, we can never be
So don't add more pain
Please don't hurt me again
I have spent so many nights
Thinking of you, longing for your touch
I have once loved you so much
I was too young then.
Two people who hurt each other due to a prank
Even the faded sadness is now
Distant memories
Sweet memories
